talk Wednesday, April 29, 2026 10:45 AM – 11:15 AM· Day 03 · The Ecosystem

Inside the LLM Black Box: How to Gain AI Visibility

SEO Week Main Venue

Speaker

Brie Moreau

Founder, White Light Digital Marketing

Founder of White Light Digital Marketing. 1,000+ hours of R&D analyzing 2M+ AI citations across ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini — separating real visibility signals from the noise authoritative sites are losing to.

LinkedInOpen profile

Abstract

1,000+ hours of R&D analyzing 2M+ AI citations across ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini. Which signals are real, which are noise, why authoritative sites get ignored.
